prompt: Create a full-body illustrated poster of a confident 1980s Miami crime-drama protagonist in a GTA V-inspired American retro promotional art style. The character is a stylish adult man with dark slicked-back wavy hair, standing in a relaxed power pose, facing slightly left while looking forward; keep his face area intentionally obscured by a soft rectangular blur as if anonymized. He wears a cream-white suit with broad shoulders and sharp black ink outlines, a vivid coral-red open-collar dress shirt, a dark belt, cream trousers, and white shoes. His left hand is down by his side and his right hand holds a lit brown cigar with curling smoke. Set him on a neon tropical boulevard at sunset in 1980s Miami, with exactly 8 visible palm trees: 2 large framing palms at the top left and top right, 2 tall skinny palms on the right side, 1 tall palm on the far left, and 3 smaller background palms along the street. Include a colorful low-rise art deco building on the lower right with orange, teal, and magenta accents, a bright pink-orange road or sidewalk in the foreground, and a turquoise-to-yellow sky with diagonal sunlit streaks. Use bold comic-book linework, saturated teal, cyan, magenta, orange, and yellow colors, dramatic cel shading, high contrast, glossy poster finish, dynamic perspective from slightly below, vertical composition, no text, no logo, no watermark.
